title: Multicolor Building Blocks Birthday Luncheon Paper Napkins (16cm) Pack of 16 - Festive Napkins for Kids' Parties
features: VIBRANT BUILDING BLOCKS DESIGN: These multicolor building blocks birthday luncheon napkins add a fun and eye-catching touch to any kids' party, featuring a playful design inspired by everyone's favorite building blocks.
PACK OF 16: With 16 colorful napkins in each pack, you'll have plenty on hand for your child's birthday bash, ensuring all guests can enjoy the festivities without any messy mishaps.

HIGH-QUALITY PAPER MATERIAL: Made from durable and absorbent paper, these 16cm x 16cm napkins are perfect for cleaning up spills, wiping mouths, and wrapping up leftover treats, keeping your party space clean and tidy.

FESTIVE & MULTICOLOR: The bright and cheerful colors of these building blocks birthday luncheon napkins are sure to lift everyone's spirits, making them a fantastic addition to your party table settings and creating a memorable experience for all.

IDEAL FOR KIDS' PARTIES: These napkins are excellent for children's birthdays or any other gathering involving young ones, offering a fantastic way to keep things clean while incorporating a touch of creativity and excitement into the event.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Ruby Red Sunflower Yellow Royal Blue Lime Green Pumpkin Orange Building Blocks Add-On Items Build your perfect Birthday party and play well with these colourful and fun designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look!
